content:
I need to multiply 470 × a98 in base 11.

First, let me convert each base-11 number to base-10:

470 (base 11) = 4×11² + 7×11¹ + 0×11⁰ = 4×121 + 7×11 + 0 = 484 + 77 + 0 = 561 (base 10)

a98 (base 11) = 10×11² + 9×11¹ + 8×11⁰ = 10×121 + 9×11 + 8 = 1210 + 99 + 8 = 1317 (base 10)

Now multiply in base 10:
561 × 1317 = 738,837 (base 10)

Now convert 738,837 back to base 11:
738,837 ÷ 11 = 67,167 remainder 0
67,167 ÷ 11 = 6,106 remainder 1
6,106 ÷ 11 = 555 remainder 1
555 ÷ 11 = 50 remainder 5
50 ÷ 11 = 4 remainder 6
4 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 4

Reading the remainders in reverse: 465110

465110
